title: DIPS Arena Clinical Document Generation Latency
app: DIPS Arena application logs via HEC or Universal Forwarder
spl:
index=healthcare sourcetype="dips:arena:applog" action="document_generated"
| bin _time span=1h
| stats avg(generation_time_ms) as avg_gen_ms, perc95(generation_time_ms) as p95_gen_ms, count as doc_count by document_type, _time
| where p95_gen_ms > 5000
| table _time, document_type, avg_gen_ms, p95_gen_ms, doc_count
description: DIPS Arena generates clinical documents вАФ discharge summaries, referral letters, lab reports, surgical notes вАФ that clinicians need promptly for patient handoff and continuity of care. Document generation involves openEHR archetype composition, template rendering, and PDF creation. Slow document generation delays discharges, referral processing, and inter-organizational communication via DIPS Communicator.
value: DIPS Arena generates clinical documents вАФ discharge summaries, referral letters, lab reports, surgical notes вАФ that clinicians need promptly for patient handoff and continuity of care. Document generation involves openEHR archetype composition, template rendering, and PDF creation. Slow document generation delays discharges, referral processing, and inter-organizational communication via DIPS Communicator.
implementation: Instrument DIPS Arena document generation events with timing information. Track generation latency by document type (discharge summary, referral, operative note, etc.), template complexity (archetype count), and output size (page count). Alert when p95 generation time exceeds 5 seconds for any document type. Correlate slow generation with database performance (complex AQL queries backing document composition) and server load. **Domain context:** Discharge summaries and referral letters are time-critical for patient flow вАФ Norwegian hospitals are increasingly measured on discharge processing speed.
visualization: Line chart (generation latency by document type), Bar chart (document volumes), Table (slowest document types with details).

references.title: Splunk Lantern вАФ use case library

detailedImplementation:
Prerequisites
вАҐ Install and configure the required add-on or app: DIPS Arena application logs via HEC or Universal Forwarder.
вАҐ Ensure the following data sources are available: `index=healthcare` `sourcetype="dips:arena:applog"` fields `document_type`, `generation_time_ms`, `template_id`, `page_count`, `archetype_count`.
вАҐ For app installation, inputs.conf, and Splunk directory layout, see the Implementation guide: docs/implementation-guide.md

Step 1 вАФ Configure data collection
Instrument DIPS Arena document generation events with timing information. Track generation latency by document type (discharge summary, referral, operative note, etc.), template complexity (archetype count), and output size (page count). Alert when p95 generation time exceeds 5 seconds for any document type. Correlate slow generation with database performance (complex AQL queries backing document composition) and server load. **Domain context:** Discharge summaries and referral letters are time-вА¶

Step 2 вАФ Create the search and alert
Run the following SPL in Search (then save as report or alert; adjust time range and threshold as needed):

```spl
index=healthcare sourcetype="dips:arena:applog" action="document_generated"
| bin _time span=1h
| stats avg(generation_time_ms) as avg_gen_ms, perc95(generation_time_ms) as p95_gen_ms, count as doc_count by document_type, _time
| where p95_gen_ms > 5000
| table _time, document_type, avg_gen_ms, p95_gen_ms, doc_count
```

Understanding this SPL

**DIPS Arena Clinical Document Generation Latency** вАФ DIPS Arena generates clinical documents вАФ discharge summaries, referral letters, lab reports, surgical notes вАФ that clinicians need promptly for patient handoff and continuity of care. Document generation involves openEHR archetype composition, template rendering, and PDF creation. Slow document generation delays discharges, referral processing, and inter-organizational communication via DIPS Communicator.

Documented **Data sources**: `index=healthcare` `sourcetype="dips:arena:applog"` fields `document_type`, `generation_time_ms`, `template_id`, `page_count`, `archetype_count`. **App/TA** (typical add-on context): DIPS Arena application logs via HEC or Universal Forwarder. The SPL below should target the same indexes and sourcetypes you configured for that feedвАФrename `index=` / `sourcetype=` if your deployment differs.

The first pipeline stage scopes events using **index**: healthcare; **sourcetype**: dips:arena:applog. That sourcetype matches what this use case lists under Data sources.

**Pipeline walkthrough**

вАҐ Scopes the data: index=healthcare, sourcetype="dips:arena:applog". Cross-check against **Data sources** above so indexes and sourcetypes match your ingestion.
вАҐ Discretizes time or numeric ranges with `bin`/`bucket`.
вАҐ `stats` rolls up events into metrics; results are split **by document_type, _time** so each row reflects one combination of those dimensions (useful for per-host, per-user, or per-entity comparisons for this use case).
вАҐ Filters the current rows with `where p95_gen_ms > 5000` вАФ typically the threshold or rule expression for this monitoring goal.
вАҐ Pipeline stage (see **DIPS Arena Clinical Document Generation Latency**): table _time, document_type, avg_gen_ms, p95_gen_ms, doc_count


Step 3 вАФ Validate
Confirm that events are present in the index and that the search returns expected results. Compare with known good/bad scenarios if applicable. Verify field extractions and index permissions.

Step 4 вАФ Operationalize
Add the search to a dashboard or set up alert actions (email, webhook, PagerDuty, etc.) as required. Document the use case in your runbook and assign an owner. Consider visualizations: Line chart (generation latency by document type), Bar chart (document volumes), Table (slowest document types with details).
grandmaExplanation: DIPS Arena generates clinical documents вАФ discharge summaries, referral letters, lab reports, surgical notes вАФ that clinicians need promptly for patient handoff and continuity of care вАФ so the things customers and regulators care about stay running and accountable.
